title: Finite Set Identity Witnesses

solver_reuse.target: finite set malformed distributive-law Bool/CNF DRAT/LRAT regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Single-element finite-set identity conflict where element c is absent from A intersect (B union C) but present in the malformed right-hand side (A intersect B) union C.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite-set rows only when they add distinct Boolean set-family solver pressure; keep reusable set encoders local until more packs duplicate the same construction.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite set membership as deterministic Bool/BV formulas.
Replay set witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Add checked SAT/CNF evidence for finite refutations once set encodings emit proof artifacts.
Keep the resource-backed malformed distributive-law CNF regression checking generated DRAT and elaborated LRAT proofs.
Promote reusable finite-set helpers only after relations/functions or cardinality packs duplicate the same logic.
